title: astragalus mattam
intro: Astragalus mattam, also known as Mattam or Mattam root, is a type of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly referred to as legumes. Traditionally, the roots of the Astragalus mattam plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus mattam are said to include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and enhancing overall well-being. In traditional Chinese medicine, the roots of the plant are often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures to be consumed for medicinal purposes.
